message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the centre and should include free parking
The hotel should have a star of 3
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 7 people and 2 nights starting from tuesday
If the booking fails how about 1 nights
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to london liverpool street and should leave on wednesday
The train should arrive by 08:00 and should depart from cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
